message:
test(golden): freeze label validation error output

Adds a golden snapshot for the CLI label validation error path
(`br label add <id> "bad label"`). Covers the error format that
4bdc01f extended to MCP — freezing the CLI surface ensures format
drift is caught by CI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+---
+source: tests/snapshots/error_messages.rs
+expression: normalize_output(&output.stderr)
+---
+Error: Validation failed: label: invalid characters (only alphanumeric, hyphen, underscore, colon allowed)
